title: DbPool uses Arc<Mutex<Connection>> instead of a proper connection pool
evidence: src/db.rs:6 — `pub type DbPool = Arc<Mutex<Connection>>;` serializes all DB access through a single mutex
suggestion: Consider using r2d2 or deadpool for connection pooling in production use

title: Validation tests only cover missing title, not missing author
evidence: src/main.rs:109 — validation_rejects_missing_title test only sends {"author": "Someone"}, no complementary test for missing author
suggestion: Add a test for missing author to fully exercise both validation branches
